overview: Aesthetic Street Wear is a modern mens fashion e-commerce store featuring a sleek white and purple design. Shop across Shirts, T-Shirts, Pants, and Accessories, manage a wishlist and cart, and place orders via WhatsApp. Includes a full admin panel for product and order management, plus a user account to track order status.
features: Product catalog across 4 categories: Shirts, T-Shirts, Pants, Accessories
Wishlist and shopping cart with item count badges
WhatsApp checkout with pre-filled order message template
Admin panel: add, edit, delete products and upload images
Admin order status management (Pending → Confirmed → Shipped → Delivered)
User order tracking dashboard to view status updates
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
White and purple modern theme with smooth animations
